title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.798 - Termination date
text:
208.798.  Termination date. — The provisions of sections 208.780 to 208.798 shall terminate on August 28, 2029.
(L. 2005 S.B. 539, A.L. 2011 H.B. 412, A.L. 2014 S.B. 754, A.L. 2017 S.B. 139, A.L. 2022 H.B. 2400 merged with S.B. 710) 
Terminates 8-28-29
